title: Smoky Croatian Beef Skillet
description: A hearty keto beef skillet recipe with smoky flavors and crunchy texture.

ingredients.name: Croatian-style Vegetables
ingredients.notes: Chopped bell peppers, onions, and mushrooms

instructions: Heat the stir-fry oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the diced bacon and cook until crispy, about 5 minutes.
Remove the bacon from the skillet and set aside.
Add the chopped vegetables to the skillet and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the sliced smoked beef to the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes, until browned.
Return the crispy bacon to the skillet and stir to combine.
Season with garlic, salt, and black pepper to taste.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and cook for an additional 10-15 minutes, or until the beef is cooked to your desired level of doneness.
